output: {"match_id":"m020","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well, but B is more discriminating: it includes explicit TTL, rate-limit, and cost constraints, plus user pressure about staleness/flapping, forcing the model to reason about freshness contracts rather than blindly re-call.
